entry.title: Make a learning activity private
entry.content: I'm new to SuccessFactors Learning so I'm reaching out to this group.  I am wondering if there is a way to make a Learning Activity, for example a class about Addressing Poor Employee Performance, private so that when the calendar invites from SuccessFactors are put on employee Outlook calendars, that no one else in our organization can see what that calendar invite says.  Any suggestions?

entry.title: Fiori elements preview not displaying cds view fields
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I have a cds view that extracts some data from the swwflexproc, swwwihead and swwuserwi tables. I have already created the necessary service definition and binding for the view. However after activating and publishing the service binding, when I run the application using the fiori elements preview, the fields that display do not match up with those defined in my cds view. I am new to abap and followed the following tutorial: Create an ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) View in ABAP On-Premise | SAP Tutorials , https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-create-cds-view.html  but cannot seem to figure out where I am going wrong. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated.

my cds view definition:

define view Z_Test_Report with parameters @Environment.systemField: #SYSTEM_DATE p_currdate: datum

as select from swwwihead as ihead

left outer join swwuserwi as userwi on ihead.wi_id = userwi.wi_id

left outer join swwflexproc as flex on ihead.wi_id = flex.wi_id

{

key flex.appl_obj_id as AppplicationObjectID,

ihead.wi_id as WorkItemID,

ihead.wi_cd as Date,

ihead.wi_aagent as Agent,

coalesce(ihead.wi_stat, 'In progress') as Status,

dats_days_between(ihead.wi_cd, :p_currdate) as Overdue,

ihead.wi_text as Comments,

}

Fields for selection in the fiori elements preview:

service definition:

@EndUserText.label: 'srvc definition exposing Z_Test_Report'

define service Z_CDS_DEFINITION {

expose Z_Test_Report as TR;

}

entry.title: Re: Field Withholding tax rate (WITH_ITEM-QSATZ) not updated
entry.content: Hi, did you solved your problem?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Change Text interpretation runtime is...
entry.content: Thanks for the update. Discussing with R&D now. Theya re in Shanghai so daily delays. He did not that Memo fields being a blob type field will not work, it's always been this way, but text files whould be fine. Still working on the right justification issue, it's definately not working in CR 2020, always ignores setting in both CRD and Code... I'll update you once he confirms the issue or not...

Phoenix Business Consulting

how do you read the message from the subscribed queue? Again via an integration flow? Have you allowlisted all headers there?

BR

Mandy

entry.title: Re: Missing F110 Payments in BNK_MONI
entry.content: F110 Payment Run is completed and file saved in AL11 folder

entry.title: Re: ORACLE ID in search help option in PA20/PA30 customiz...
entry.content:
So create (SE11) an elementary search-help on table PA0105, a view such as V_BW_PA0105_USER or a custom create view, and then append this search help to standard search help PREM (collective) before mapping parameter between collective and elementary search help.

NB: There is a shortcut in SPRO (transaction  OG00) for this, read its documentation first.

entry.title: Re: Contact Replication SAP CRM -> C4C Address Version
entry.content:
Hello,

Were you able to resolve this? Is it even possible to replicate Contact International Versions from CRM to C4C?

Thanks,

Vishwa.

entry.title: Assignment profile stopped executing after I removed one filter and saved but did not execute
entry.content:
We have an assignment profile that is executing. I removed a filter, saved, and downloaded the user report. I added the filter back on and saved. Basically, I did not make a change, I just wanted to view the download report without one rule. The assignment profile stopped executing. 

Is this a normal behavior for assignment profiles? I understood that the assignment profile continues to execute, just not with the saved changes. Please help me. Thank you! Connie

entry.title: 2SL to 3SL conversion question
entry.content:
Hi, 

We are in process of moving from 2SL to 3SL. we have a open question.

 When our current non prod gets converted to Dev with two tenants 80 for development and 100 for customization. Our assumption is 100 will be the tenant which will have data and to be used for unit testing. 

Could you please confirm.

entry.title: Configuration for material split valuation
entry.content:
We would like to know which configuration should be used to set valuation types for material split valuation.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Configuration for material split valuation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


The Configuration Activity / SSCUI to define the Valuation Types and Categories is "Activate Split Valuation for Valuation Area" (101717). You can also refer to the SAP Help Portal documentation below:

Split Valuation
Valuation


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: System view not showing data in Container
entry.content:
Most of system views have some logic to filter the data depending on user system privileges. As you can see in the screenshot, M_TABLE_STATISTICS will return no result if you don't have system privilege CATALOG READ or DATA ADMIN.

When running a data preview in BAS or WebIDE for HANA, the query will execute with the application user  of your hdi container (user ..._RT). To grant necessary privilege to application user, you should use .hdbgrants artifact (see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4505d0bdaf4948449b7f7379d24d0f0d/f49c1f5c72ee453788bf79f113d83bf9.html )

entry.title: Re: anybody tried the learning hub IDES yet?
entry.content:
241119 update: the source has since been deprecated:

error 404
oops!
We can't seem to find the page you are looking for

entry.title: Re: Missing F110 Payments in BNK_MONI
entry.content: missing authorization, incorrect workflow?

entry.title: Re: after unsuccessful authentication
entry.content:
seems like the issue has cleared itself.

will remove/delete the main post unless someone beats me to it.

entry.title: Re: How to connect salesforce to datasphere ?
entry.content:
Hi, integrating Salesforce with SAP Datasphere can greatly improve data accessibility and optimize workflows. For a successful Salesforce SAP integration, you’ll typically need to:

  1. Set up a secure connection using SAP’s Cloud Connector, which involves installing and configuring it to link your SAP environment with the cloud.
  2. Configure OAuth authentication in Salesforce, including creating a connected app and setting appropriate permissions.
  3. Define data models in SAP Datasphere to align with Salesforce objects for seamless data flow.

If you have specific use cases—such as syncing customer data or reports—I’d be happy to share more targeted steps or direct you to detailed resources. Let me know what your priorities are for this integration.

entry.title: Re: Criteria for copying journal entries
entry.content:
Hi @NiklasT,

It is only possible to copy manually created Journal entries posted through the 'Post General Journal Entries' app. You will not be able to use the 'Copy' function in this app to copy the journal entries that were auto created based on sub ledger postings (MM/AP/AR/AA). 

Please refer to the comments section of this Customer Influence Portal (CIP) request:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/278776/?section=sectionDetails

Regards,

Shreya

entry.title: Change a dataset in a SAC story and to keep the story structure
entry.content:
hi,

is it possible to change a dataset in a story and to keep the existing story structure:

i didnt find a way to do this...

1.) a datset with the same structure?

2) a datset with a modified structure (just to add some columns) 

br Oliver

entry.title: Re: Goods Movement-Account Determination
entry.content: C. Valuation Area - it's not a property of a goods movement.

entry.title: Re: Goods Movement-Account Determination
entry.content:
A. Account grouping code

B. Posting Key

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements Side Effect not working with custo...
entry.content: Hi, how did you resolved this issue?

entry.title: Can you federate content from R3 into BTP workzone?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an existing transaction in an on premise ECC system (with embeded SAP_GWFND component) that we'd want to consume from the BTP Launchpad (SAP Build Workzone, advanced edition).

Is there any way to do this?

We tried creating an app in BTP with UI technology "SAP GUI for HTML" and the transaction code, but it didn't work (just got an internal error message when tried to access the tile within the launchpad).

We also tried federating the content from ECC into BTP workzone content management (as a new content provider), but didn't work either and all the documentation we found for on-prem federation only refers to SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business Suite or SAP Enterprise Portal (nothing for ECC R3, so not sure if this is a viable option).

Any advice or suggestion would be appreciated.

SAP Business Technology Platform SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Exploring Your SAP Solution: Engaging Stakeholders Early in the Implementation Process
entry.content:
Why is it important to familiarize yourself with your solution prior to implementation?

Let me share a story about a customer I worked with who took the time to enable their team before starting the project implementation and design discussions.

This customer was new to SAP and purchased a solution that was unfamiliar to them, yet critical for their business. As we recommend to all our customers, we advised them to undergo solution enablement before project implementation. This approach would help them become more familiar with the solution and maximize its value throughout the implementation process.

You’re probably wondering how it went for that customer. Well, I can tell you—it went really well!

When we began the design workshops, we presented the standard capabilities, as we always recommend to our customers for creating a scalable solution. However, we also recognize that business-specific requirements often call for adjustments. During these discussions, our customer was not only better prepared to engage with the topics and explanations we provided, but they were also able to identify key functionalities that would help enhance their business.

These design discussions are crucial during project implementation because they define the foundation of the customer’s solution. If the design is not done correctly from the start, the customer may end up with a solution that isn’t viable. Moreover, having the right solution design in place ensures that, during the testing phase, you're validating the solution effectively—rather than testing irrelevant processes that don’t align with the business needs. And that’s exactly what happened—my customer ended up with a solution that perfectly met their needs.

Another benefit was the time efficiency. By enabling themselves early on, the workshop discussions ran smoothly and stayed within the defined timelines, allowing us to progress without any delays. And it wasn’t just in the early stages where we were time-efficient; throughout all phases of the project implementation, we stayed on track because the scope of what needed to be delivered was clear from the start.

Finally, the entire team was engaged from day one and understood the impact of implementing a new solution. Typically, when a new solution is being implemented, not all users immediately embrace the change. Senior leadership is eager to move to a new system to improve business performance, increase margins and save costs, but business users are often resistant, especially when they are unfamiliar with the new system.

However, by enabling key stakeholders early on, we were able to make a significant impact on the skeptical business users. These stakeholders were able to champion the solution, sharing the added value it brought for the business users by streamlining their daily tasks. This empowered the business users to engage during the discussions and focus on higher-value activities, keeping them motivate. It also reinforced that everyone was contributing to the overall success of the business.

In a nutshell:

Gaining knowledge about SAP solution ahead of time is crucial, allows customers to maximize the value of the system from day one. 

By familiarizing themselves with the features, functionalities, and best practices before implementation, customers can ensure a smoother transition, reduce potential challenges, and align the solution more effectively with their business goals. This proactive approach allows teams to ask informed questions, make strategic decisions, and prepare their organization for a more seamless integration.

Furthermore, early exposure to the SAP solution empowers customers to take full advantage of its capabilities, ensuring they are ready to leverage its tools and insights to drive business success once the system goes live.

Stay curious and never stop learning!

 

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Check out other blogs from the series   Customer Onboarding at SAP
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author:

  • Ana Barreira

    Serves as the Global Onboarding Advisor for the SAP Transportation Management (TM) solution within the Supply Chain Management area. She provides expert guidance and support to new SAP customers from contract signature through to successful go-live. With eleven years of experience—three of which have been as a Global Onboarding Advisor, and eight years as an SAP Consultant—Ana specializes in the SAP TM solution. She has successfully supported full-cycle customer implementation projects, assisted partners, and contributed to internal enablement efforts

    Having questions, comments or feedbacks? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact @Ana_Barreira or @Linh-Hoang .

    ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: SRM transfer shopping cart to ECC
entry.content: We have a few shopping carts that did not update accounting in ECC.  They are not stored in MM in ECC, just accounting impact.  They seem to all be deleted lines.  /SAPPSSRM/SC_COMMIT_REPOST does not work.  We have seen note 3473514 and are working on testing it.  Our change management process takes some time to get things to production so we are looking for something we may be able to use ASAP.  Any thoughts welcome, thank you!

entry.title: SAP Incentive Management - Understanding of CSN file & CLI Command to generate
entry.content:
Understanding Schema Notation (CSN) and Its Role in Embedded Analytics for SAP Incentive Management

Introduction to Schema Notation (CSN)

Schema Notation (CSN) is a powerful and flexible format used to represent the structure and metadata of data models in SAP's Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model. CSN files are JSON-based and provide a comprehensive way to describe entities, relationships, and other aspects of a data model. This notation is particularly useful for reporting developers working with SAP IM (Incentive Management) solutions, as it facilitates the integration and analysis of complex data structures.

Why CSN is Important

CSN files serve as a bridge between the design-time and runtime environments. They allow developers to define their data models in a human-readable format, which can then be easily transformed into various runtime artifacts. This capability is crucial for embedded analytics, where real-time data insights are necessary for making informed business decisions.

Benefits of Using CSN for Embedded Analytics (SAC)

  1. Consistency and Accuracy: CSN ensures that the data model definitions are consistent across different environments. This consistency is vital for accurate data analysis and reporting.

  2. Ease of Integration: CSN files can be easily integrated with various SAP tools and services, making it simpler to embed analytics into SAP Incentive Management solutions. This integration allows for seamless data flow and real-time insights.

  3. Flexibility: The JSON-based structure of CSN files makes them highly flexible and easy to manipulate. Developers can quickly adjust the data models to meet changing business requirements without extensive rework.

  4. Enhanced Collaboration: CSN files are human-readable, which facilitates better collaboration among development teams. Everyone involved in the project can understand and contribute to the data model definitions.

Generating CSN Files

To generate a CSN file from a CDS (Core Data Services) model, you can use the cds command-line tool. Here’s a step-by-step guide:

  1. Install the CDS Development Kit: Ensure you have the CDS development kit installed globally on your system:

    npm install -g @sap/cds-dk

  2. Navigate to Your Project Directory: Open your terminal and navigate to the directory containing your CDS files.

  3. Compile the CDS Model to CSN: Use the following command to compile your CDS model into a CSN file:

    cds compile <your-cds-file>.cds --to csn --dest <output-file>.csn

    Replace <your-cds-file>.cds with the name of your CDS file and <output-file>.csn with the desired name for the output CSN file.

Detailed Instructions

https://github.com/yogananda-muthaiah/SAP-Sucessfactors-Incentive-Management/blob/main/Integrations/EA/csn.md 

Practical Example

Consider a scenario where you need to analyze sales data within SAP Incentive Management. By defining your custom data model in CDS and generating a CSN file, you can consume analytics directly into your EA solution. This approach allows sales teams to access real-time insights, such as sales trends and customer preferences, directly within the EA interface.

Conclusion

Schema Notation (CSN) plays a crucial role in the development and deployment of embedded analytics within SAP Incentive Management integrated solutions. By providing a consistent, flexible, and easy-to-integrate format for data models, CSN enables developers to deliver powerful analytics capabilities that drive informed decision-making and enhance business performance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Preview is not working in IOS Build Ap...
entry.content: Estou com este mesmo problema

entry.title: Purchasing Info Record number range in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, 

I can't find a way to maintain the Purchasing Info Record number range in SAP Public Cloud. 

Please, can someone help me on how to do it?

entry.title: AP is executing and a change to AP was saved but not executed
entry.content: Several users were not assigned required curriculum even if the AP included their job code ID. They were previously assigned via AP and then removed by an admin

entry.title: GO Button(Fiori List Report). When Press GO button should Validate Selection fields
entry.content:
I have created report by using List Report (Fiori template) with CDS odata service.

Requirement: Without entering any input values on Selection Fields user Press GO button should give the error message like "Please do not run without selection fields input" and not display the data.

Basically I need to validate selection fields when press GO button

If anybody is done this same scenario kindly provide the details of code with place holders.

Thanks, 

Subba Reddy

entry.title: Re: no access to SAP Build Apps Lobby via subaccount
entry.content: thanks for the recommendation, the issue seems to be with the Default identity provider, which does not work

entry.title: Re: no access to SAP Build Apps Lobby via subaccount
entry.content: I´ve changed now to a "Custom Identity Provider for Applications" which does work in the sense of getting to SAP Build in general, but now I do have another issue and cannot load any application in SAP Build

entry.title: Re: How to set up combination resources in SAP Transportation Management
entry.content:
@Michael_Haase Great blog. Thanks for sharing !

 

I have configured the resource combination and created a combination resource for a truck and a trailer. However, I am unable to specify the vehicle resource. Is this the expected behavior, or could it be a bug in my system? The fields appear to be greyed out.

Thank you in advance for your advice!

Oumaima

entry.title: SAP build Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500
entry.content:
when opening up SAP build and try to start a new project, I do get the following error

"Something went wrong"
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 ()Understand this errorAI
callback:1
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 ()

my guess - seems an issue with the "Custom Identity Provider for Applications" / trust configuration but I do not know how to solve, any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Issue with Passing FREE SELECTIONS in SUBMIT Without VIA SELECTION-SCREEN
entry.content: RFBILA00

entry.title: Re: how to display fields before alv o/p like header data
entry.content:
WRITE 'Hello'.

CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE...'

WRITE 'Hello'.

CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE...'

etc.

e.g. ALV BLOCK DISPLAY TOTAL ISSUE - SAP Community

entry.title: Payroll data extraction before release to accounting
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Please help in extracting monthly SAP HR payroll data from HCM before it is actually release to accounts.

appreciate your help.

regards

zaks

entry.title: Re: Use of Combination Resources in SAP TM
entry.content:
@former_member809312 Great blog. Thanks for sharing !

I have configured the resource combination and created a combination resource for a truck and a trailer. However, I am unable to specify the vehicle resource. Is this the expected behavior, or could it be a bug in my system? The fields appear to be greyed out.

Thank you in advance for your advice!

 

 

 

Oumaima

entry.title: Re: "SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed"...
entry.content: I tried your 4 steps but still got the same error. I skipped the Boosters step and was able to proceed to the next steps.

entry.title: Re: Can I extend a certain app? With Clean Core? How?
entry.content:
Hi mlauber,

Many thanks for the reply, it is very helpful

entry.title: Re: The Risks and Rewards of Using PFCGMASSCOLLASSIGN in SAP Security; Mass Composite Role Updates
entry.content:
Shouldn't you report this a bug or does SAP regards this behaviour as a feature?

I know SAP considers not filled in fields as a * in ABAP selections but this could be so devastating that I don't understand why SAP doesn't make a selection for these fields mandatory. Then you immediately understand that you must fill in a value in order for this tcode to work and you could still have the <ALL> functionality by willingly fill in an '*:

entry.title: Dispatcher and message server are in grey while starting the SAP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings

while starting the SAP server using Sap controls some services are not coming up like message server and dispatcher could you please suggest me the best way to troubleshoot the issue.

Note: we have copied the PRD data to SBX server. While starting the server we are encounter the issue and Database is up and running.

Thanks 

Maladri

entry.title: column width alignment missing for drop down values in SAP UI5 application.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing column width issue in my SAP UI5 application. For Enter Code column, if there are no dropdown values it should be disabled and if there are drop down values it should display the drop down values. Please let me know how to correct the column alignment.

Below is my code in my view.xml file. 

                <IconTabFilter id="iconTabBarTakeReading" text="{i18n>TakeReading}" icon="sap-icon://measurement-document" count="{detailView>/CountMeasuringData}">
                                <Table id="bindMeasuringPoint" noDataText="{i18n>lblNoMeasuringData}" alternateRowColors="true" headerText="{i18n>ttlMeasuringData}"
                                       class="sapUiResponsiveMargin" autoPopinMode="true" >
                                    <columns>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblMeasuringPoint}"/>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblMeasuringDescription}"/>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblEnterReading}"/>                                            
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column id="column50">
                                            <header>
                                                <Text text="{i18n>lblValuationCode}"/>
                                            </header>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin" width="7rem">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblUoM}"/>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblLastReading}"/>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column id="column51">
                                            <header>
                                                <Text text="{i18n>lblPreviousValuationCode}"/>
                                            </header>
                                        </Column>                                        
                                    </columns>
                                    <items>
                                        <ColumnListItem id="_IDGenColumnListItem">
                                            <cells>
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText" text="{POINT}" />
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText1" text="{PTTXT}"/>
                                                <Input width="100%" id="read123" enabled="{= ${MRNGU} === '' ? false : true}" value="{EnterReading}"
                                                       maxLength="8" type="Number" liveChange="liveChangefn"/>                                                                                                                                                        
                                                <Select id="_IDSelect" enabled="{= ${NOCOD} === '' ? false : true}"
                                                        width="100%" selectedKey="{VLCOD}" items="{ path: 'MpointToVcodeNav/results'}">
                                                    <items>
                                                        <core:Item id="_IDGenItem" key="{VLCOD}" text="{VTEXT}" />
                                                    </items>
                                                </Select>
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText2" text="{RECDU}"/>
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText3" text="{READG}"/>
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText4" text="{KURZTEXT}"/>
                                            </cells>
                                        </ColumnListItem>
                                    </items>
                                </Table>
                            </IconTabFilter>

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Regarding the integration between SSAM 2310 and Micro...
entry.content:
Hi Kingston,

By standard, the MDK client does not support opening web pages within the client. To achieve this, you can create a custom extension.

Regards,

Sabarish K

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
Hi Marcal,

unfortunately it is not possible to perform a downport of this functionality.   

I agree that it is a little bit cumbersome. But it is not a risk. The code that you have created once can be maintained manually. So changing it only requires ADT. And the BTP ABAP Environment will be there in the future as well or you have the option to upgrade your on prem or private cloud systems to a release of SAP S/4HANA 2025 or later later this year.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Re: Modify the Financial Review booklet
entry.content:
Hi Eyal,
you find in the review booklet variables, which are on booklet level (in the filter bar) and more page specific variables are defined and changed on page level.
The FS Item hierarchy as well as the reporting item hierarchy can be changed on page level.
So when you run your booklet you have to open the side panel called page filters.
Here you can change the hierarchy ID as well as filter the hierarchy nodes you want to see on your page.
hope this helps?

Kind Regards Stefan

entry.title: Watch the SAP Fieldglass 2024.11 Release Highlights Video Series
entry.content:
The SAP Fieldglass 2024.11 Release Highlights video series is now available. These videos showcase exciting Artificial Intelligence features, self-service innovations for Configuration Manager users, general highlights, and new enhancements to the Statement of Work module.

Now grab your popcorn, get comfortable, and prepare to discover all the exciting features coming with the SAP Fieldglass 2024.11 release by watching the SAP Fieldglass 2024.11 Release Highlights video series here.

Please note that some of these items may not be relevant to your program, it is dependent on modules and features/functionalities enabled. If you have any questions, queries, or concerns about the information in this guide, or the release in general, please submit a case through SAP for Me or the SAP Fieldglass Help Center.

Want more information about the SAP Fieldglass 2024.11 Release?

  • Stay up to date on all SAP Fieldglass release information through the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal.
  • Join the SAP Fieldglass Product Success Work Zone and view the Release Readiness page to access additional release resources.

entry.title: Re: Reports for SSAM 2405
entry.content:
Hi Ashish,

To monitor transactions, use the MAIF Admin Portal (T-Code: /syclo/admin). For building dynamic and interactive dashboards, check the below article on MAIF & SAC integration for SSAM transactions.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-service-and-asset-manager-integration-with-sap-analytics-cloud-sac/ba-p/13766799

Regards,

Sabarish K

entry.title: So wenden Sie sich an das SAP Education - Learning-Hub-Team um Unterstützung zu erhalten
entry.content:
** This blog was in collaboration/translation with my German speaking colleague Rebecca Dolan

Benötigen Sie Unterstützung vom Learning Hub/Schulungsteam erhalten und wissen nicht, wo Sie anfangen sollen? Dann ist dieser Blog für Sie…  

Hier zeige ich Ihnen die Schritte, um das SAP Learning Support Center zu kontaktieren. Die Support-Mitarbeiter sind Montag bis Freitag, rund um die Uhr verfügbar, und die meisten Anfragen werden innerhalb von 24 Stunden beantwortet. 

* Klicken Sie hier, wenn Sie dies auf Englisch oder Spanisch lesen möchten

 

In der Support-Plattform finden Sie auch häufig gestellte Fragen zu folgenden Themen:  

  • Allgemeine Support-Themen  
  • Praxissysteme  
  • Themen von Schulungs-Reseller-Partnern  
  • Lern- und Zertifizierungsberatung   
  • Kursbuchung und Bezahlung   
  • Und Analyse-Dashboard 

 Anlegen eines Falls  

Wenn Sie feststellen, dass Sie auf der Supportplattform nicht die gewünschten Informationen finden, können Sie einen Fall anlegen, um Unterstützung mit Ihrer Anfrage zu erhalten.   

Dazu müssen Sie sich lediglich mit Ihrer Universal ID anmelden und ein Ticket erstellen. 

Auf der SAP-Learning-Hub-Website:  

  1. Klicken Sie auf das Fragezeichen (?) rechts oben auf der Seite.
  2. Auf der Help-Center-Seite wählen Sie dann auf die Registerkarte „Contact Us“, und klicken dann auf „Request Technical Assistance“. 
  3. Klicken Sie dann auf „Need More Help“. 

     

  4. Melden Sie sich mit Ihrer Universal ID an, und klicken Sie dann auf "Create Case". 

 Auf der SAP-Learning-Website:  

  1. Scrollen Sie nach unten zum Ende der Seite, und klicken Sie unter „Support and Contact“ auf „Get Support“. 
  2. Nun werden Sie auf die User-Support-Center Webseite weitergeleitet. Dort finden Sie die FAQs zur Selbsthilfe und detaillierte Leitfäden.  
  3. Wenn der erforderliche Support nicht in den FAQs gefunden wird, scrollen Sie nach unten, und klicken auf das „Need Help“ Symbol. Sie werden dann zur nächsten Seite weitergeleitet, um ein Ticket zu erstellen.  
  4. Klicken Sie "Create Case". 

     

Darüber hinaus können Sie den direkten Link zum User-Support-Center verwenden.  

Um den Status Ihres Tickets zu sehen, klicken Sie auf den Refresh-Button, um den Status ihres Tickets zu aktualisieren. 

Worin können Supportmitarbeiter Sie unterstützen?  

Das Schulungsteam kann Sie unterstützen, wenn Sie Informationen zu Kursen, Zertifizierungsinhalten und Learning Journeys erhalten möchten. Außerdem kann es Sie beraten, um zu verstehen, welche Schulungen erforderlich sind, um Ihre Ziele zu erreichen.  

Weitere Leistungen sind:   

  • Fragen zur Zertifizierung, einschließlich Ratschläge zur korrekten UID-Einrichtung und wie Sie auf Ihre Badges zugreifen können.   
  • Probleme im Zusammenhang mit Informations-, Liefer- und Nachsorgeleistungen von Unterrichtsräumen mit Kursleiter.  
  • Buchungen und abrechnungsbezogene Probleme werden in der Regel von einem anderen internen Team bearbeitet, aber das Learning-Team kann sich einbringen, um die Genehmigung für kostenlose Umbuchungen und ähnliche Szenarien zu erteilen, da diese häufig mit Kundenreklamationen usw. zusammenhängen.  
  • Visabriefe.  
  • Bereitstellen von Lieferanteninformationen auf Anforderung. 

Fordern Sie Unterstützung in einer anderen Sprache an.  

Wenn Sie möchten, dass das Schulungsteam Sie in Ihrer bevorzugten Sprache unterstützt, können Sie die Sprache auswählen, nachdem Sie die Beschreibung hinzugefügt haben. Sie müssen das Land auswählen, in dem Sie sich befinden, und zwischen Deutsch, Englisch, Spanisch, Französisch und Japanisch wählen. 

Zusätzlich empfehlen wir Ihnen den Blog  SAP Certifications and UID...all you need to know! Um mehr zum Them SAP-Zertifizierungen und UID zu erfahren. 

Der folgende Wissensdatenbankartikel kann auch hilfreich sein: 2404504 - Hilfe zum SAP Learning Hub oder SAP Training Center 

Danke fürs Lesen!

entry.title: Re: How to create a story where the positions that have no successors appear?
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: How to create a story where the positions that have no successors appear?
entry.content: Hi, Does anyone have solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Output of one table col should be passed as input to...
entry.content: Hi, I achieved the requirement by using below script.

entry.title: 32-bit CR.NET support question
entry.content:
We are currently using the 32-bit CR .NET Runtime in our application. According to this SAP documentation,  https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354088411.html, the 32-bit CR .NET Runtime will be discontinued after December 2025. Could you clarify what "discontinued" means in this context? Will it still be available for use? Additionally, how will this affect   our application that have already been shipped to customers earlier and are still in use?

From the same page, it appears that the overall end of support for Crystal Reports is 2027. Do you have any recommendations for a migration path once Crystal Reports reaches its end of life?

entry.title: Cómo comunicarse con el equipo de SAP Education - Learning Hub para obtener ayuda
entry.content:
¿Está buscando obtener ayuda del SAP Education/Learning Hub y no sabe por dónde empezar? Entonces este blog es para usted... 

Aquí compartiré los pasos que debes seguir para interactuar con el área de soporte; los agentes están disponibles las 24 horas del día, de lunes a viernes, y la mayoría de las consultas se responden dentro de las 24 horas. 

* Haga click aqui si desea leer este blog en Alemán o en Inglés

En  la plataforma de soporte también podrás encontrar preguntas frecuentes relacionadas con: 

  • Temas de soporte general 
  • Sistemas de práctica 
  • Temas de capacitación para socios revendedores 
  • Asesoramiento sobre aprendizaje y certificación  
  • Reserva y pago de cursos  
  • Y panel de análisis 

Cómo crear un caso 

Si la información que está buscando no está en la plataforma, puede crear un caso para obtener ayuda sobre su consulta específica.  

Todo lo que necesita hacer es iniciar sesión con su Universal ID y crear un ticket. 

Desde el sitio SAP Learning Hub : 

  1. Debe hacer clic en el ícono del signo de interrogación (?) que se encuentra en la parte superior derecha de la página. 
  2. En la página del Centro de ayuda, haga clic en el botón “Contáctenos” y seleccione “Solicitar asistencia técnica”
     
  3. Haga clic en "¿Necesita más ayuda?" 
  4. Inicie sesión con su ID Universal y luego deberá hacer clic en "Crear caso" 

Desde el sitio de aprendizaje de SAP : 

  1. Desplácese hasta la parte inferior de la página y haga clic en “Obtener soporte”, que se encuentra en Soporte y contacto. 
  2. Será dirigido a la siguiente página, la página del Centro de soporte al usuario, donde podrá encontrar las preguntas frecuentes de autoayuda y guías detalladas. 
  3. Si no encuentra la ayuda que necesita en las preguntas frecuentes, desplácese hacia abajo y haga clic en el ícono "¿Necesita ayuda?" y será dirigido a la página siguiente para generar un ticket. 
  4. Haga clic en el botón “Crear caso”. 

Además, puede utilizar el enlace directo al Centro de soporte al usuario . 

Para ver la actualización de su ticket: haga clic en el botón Actualizar antes de encontrar la actualización de su caso/ticket. 

¿En qué pueden ayudarle los agentes de soporte? 

El Equipo de Aprendizaje puede ayudarle si desea obtener información sobre cursos, contenido de certificación y rutas de aprendizaje. También pueden asesorarle para que comprenda qué aprendizaje es necesario para lograr sus objetivos. 

Otros servicios incluyen:  

  • Preguntas de primer nivel sobre certificación, incluido asesoramiento sobre la configuración correcta del UID y cómo acceder a sus credenciales.  
  • Cuestiones relacionadas con la información, la prestación y el servicio posterior a las clases dirigidas por instructores. 
  • Los problemas relacionados con las reservas y la facturación generalmente los maneja otro equipo interno, pero el equipo de aprendizaje puede involucrarse para dar aprobación para cualquier nueva reserva gratuita y situaciones similares, ya que a menudo están relacionadas con quejas de los clientes, etc. 
  • Cartas de visa. 
  • Proporcionar información de proveedores a pedido. 

Solicitar soporte en un idioma diferente. 

Si desea que el equipo de aprendizaje lo ayude en su idioma preferido, puede seleccionar el idioma una vez que haya agregado la descripción, deberá elegir el país en el que se encuentra y seleccionar entre: Alemán, Inglés, Español, Francés y Japonés. 

También nos gustaría compartir este blog para que puedas aprender más sobre las certificaciones SAP y UID... ¡todo lo que necesitas saber! Y este KBA también puede ser útil:  2404504 - Cómo obtener ayuda con SAP Learning Hub o SAP Training Center 

¡Gracias por leer!

entry.title: Re: SAC chart variance - "The time dimension does not hav...
entry.content:
Hello @stephlef, could you explain what kind of workaround you're using. I have the same issue atm & don't know how to dance around this.

Also getting the ambiguous hierarchy issue & when creating a restricted calculation, the "Select by Range" option is just not there:

entry.title: Global benefits provisioning job didn't work for persons who is terminated and newly hired
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a scenario where employee is terminated and newly hired in a different country, so in this case person ID remain same but User ID changes however when I run the benefits master data changes provisioning job then the log shows "Processed 0 users" in Execution Manager Dashboard which means that the system is unable to recognise this user based on the person ID provided in the job parameters.

In a different scenario, when when we run the benefit master data changes Job for Global assignment person ID's, the system successfully processed the users to validate the eligibility criteria for benefit plan enrolment.

The common factor in both the scenarios is person ID remain same and user id changes. So what is the criteria in the first case why system does not process the person when terminated and newly hired.

Please let me know if anyone is experienced in Benefits module and came across this situation and how to fix it.

Thanks,

Thrilleswar.

entry.title: Re: SAP Joule Capabilities
entry.content: It is quite a broad request. I would suggest by starting with the learning journeys at https://learning.sap.com/artificial-intelligence and to narrow down to more specific questions posted here. Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Python samples in ASE did not work and fail with an I...
entry.content:
Hi,

This actually isn't a typo, but documentation that hasn't been updated for newer versions of the module.

I've created a CR or change request for these Python pages. I've found 3 pages so far.

The python modules are built with specific python versions.
Windows
%SYBASE%\%SYBASE_OCS%\python\pythonXX_64
All other platforms
$SYBASE/$SYBASE_OCS/python/pythonXX_64r

XX will be the python version that the module is built for in that directory.
So python 3.11 would use python311_64r

Hope that helps,
Ryan

entry.title: Re: time dependent tab in asset master data
entry.content:
For which fields can you enter time-dependent changes in the asset master record? Note: There are 3 correct answers
to this question
A. Cost center
B. Trading partner number
C. Plant
D. Description
E. WBS element
Correct

entry.title: SAP Activate for RISE with SAP: Roadmap Updates & New Content!
entry.content:
My original Blog Post about SAP Activate Methodology for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition has gotten over 17,000 views - thank you all so much for your interest! But since then, the SAP Activate team has made some significant updates to the SAP Activate roadmap for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and a lot of new content has been released. 

In the following blog I want to highlight the following updates, that we have made since the publication of that last blog. We made more changes throughout the years and weeks since we publish on a bi-weekly release, but these are the most important and recent updates

  • Clean Core Strategy 
  • Selective Data Transition Path 
  • SAP Cloud ALM 
  • SAP Signavio 
  • SAP LeanIX
  • Release Notes 

Clean Core Strategy 

A key change that customers will notice is the introduction of the Clean Core Strategy, announced at the beginning of the year. The 'clean core' is a concept designed to achieve modern, flexible, and cloud-compliant ERPs. For an up-to-date ERP, customers achieve a clean core by integrating and extending the system in a cloud-compliant way, while governing master data and business processes. This approach ensures that when it comes time to upgrade a system, changes can be implemented without significant manual efforts to test and adapt existing structures. 

    Figure 1: Criteria for a Clean Core

SAP Activate offers advice for customers who want to keep their ERP systems clean from unnecessary changes. This way, their organization can take advantage of the latest release with minimal modifications and extensions & customizations that work well in the cloud. SAP Activate contains recommended tasks in the Clean Core Success Plan. It is available as a Tag that you can access on the Content tab. One of the main steps is to set up a governance for clean core by creating the Solution Standardization Board in Prepare phase and regularly performing governance activities, including capturing the action plan in dedicated runbook project in SAP Cloud ALM to track your progress towards clean core objectives. 

To get you up to speed on Clean Core, check out these resources: 

    • ERP Clean Core Strategy
    • SAP Activate Minute for RISE with SAP Clean Core
    • Clean Core related enhancements in the Solution Standardization Board for RISE with SAP.
    • Enhanced RISE with SAP Methodology with clean core quality checks
    • Learn here how to setup a dedicated runbook in SAP Cloud ALM

Selective Data Transition

Another key change that was made is that we added a new transition scenario in the SAP Activate Methodology for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. The Selective Data Transition.

With the Selective Data Transition, you can migrate entire or selective historical data into SAP S/4HANA using high-speed and flexible data migration process. With a selective data transition, the source system is an SAP ERP system, while the target will be the SAP S/4HANA system, which can be an empty shell, a newly implemented, or an already productive system. The migration typically requires minimal downtime and can be executed either in a single step or in waves. It offers a balanced blend of the New Implementation and System Conversion approaches, combining their advantages to provide customers greater flexibility in data transfer and harmonization when transitioning to SAP S/4HANA. 

The content for this transition path was added via a tag in the roadmap viewer, where you can find deliverables, tasks and accelerators to help you understand the transition path and how SAP can support you. 

SAP Cloud ALM 

SAP Cloud ALM enhances the Activate methodology by delivering support for project management and execution. Over the years, we have introduced numerous SAP Activate templates within SAP Cloud ALM. When initiating a project, customers can select a specific implementation roadmap to guide their transformation journey.

For instance, the new selective data transition scenario mentioned above, is now supported by a dedicated template in Cloud ALM. This template is updated bi-weekly with the latest changes, which are accessible through the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer.

When starting a new project, customers can easily select the appropriate template to start their transformation journey. (Refer to Figure 2)

Figure 2: SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation 

Additionally, customers leveraging Cloud ALM and the Business Transformation Center can unlock even greater value. The Business Transformation tool, integral to the selective data transition process, is seamlessly integrated within Cloud ALM. 

In the image below, customers can see how Cloud ALM enables seamless navigation from the project implementation tab directly to the transformation project to use Business Transformation Center, during a Lean selective data transition scenario. 

Figure 3: SAP Business Transformation Center in Cloud ALM

Learn more by watching this great enablement Lean Selective Data Transition Overview Video. 

Additional transition scenario for SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition are also available in SAP Cloud ALM and updated bi-weekly. 

SAP Signavio

SAP Signavio helps accelerate SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition transformation and business process performance. SAP Signavio is a platform that allows customers to model, analyze, optimize and execute business processes. SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub facilitates collaboration and communication on a project while SAP Signavio Process Manager helps customer re-imagine, document, model and simulate business processes. 

SAP Activate contains SAP Signavio procedure notes with details on how customers can leverage the tool during their transformation journey. You can also find specific Signavio solutions such as Process Insights, Process Intelligence, Process Governance are used in various tasks. It is available in the Product section that you can access on the Content tab.

To get you up to speed on SAP Signavio in SAP Activate, check out these resources: 

  • SAP Signavio Product Tag in SAP Activate Methodology for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • SAP Signavio Methodology for SAP S/4HANA Transformation

SAP LeanIX

SAP LeanIX is a solution that allows customers to manage and optimize enterprise architecture. SAP LeanIX provides a 360° overview of all applications, business capabilities, and IT components, enabling customers to gain control of their expanding IT landscape and create roadmaps for major transformation initiatives. Through collaborative and democratized data collection, out-of-the-box integrations, and fast insights through reports and diagrams, SAP LeanIX enables customers to manage enterprise architecture effectively. SAP LeanIX can be beneficial throughout an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Implementation, supporting initial assessment and creating a clear overview of the existing IT landscape. 

SAP Activate contains procedure notes on SAP LeanIX in relevant tasks, with more information on how customers can leverage the tool during their transformation journey. It is available in the Product section that you can access on the Content tab.

To get you up to speed on SAP LeanIX in SAP Activate, check out these resources: 

  • SAP LeanIX Product Tag in SAP Activate Methodology for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • SAP LeanIX Home Page
  • Self-Enable on SAP LeanIX 

 

Release Notes 

To help you navigate these changes, you can refer to the release notes here. You'll find a summary of what's new, updated, or changed in the key deliverable tasks, and accelerators. The implementation roadmap is updated biweekly, so please be sure to check it regularly for the latest updates.  

Stay tuned for ongoing enhancements and future updates! We're always striving to improve our content, and your feedback plays a crucial role in that process. Feel free to share your thoughts and suggestions via the Roadmap Viewer page—we’d love to hear from you!

Head over to the release blog mentioned in the first section and explore the latest updates to SAP Activate for RISE with SAP.

Thanks again for reading

entry.title: Re: Personas 3.0 SAP GUI and Scripting - Does not work af...
entry.content:
As it is known, Personas scripts in SAP GUI for Windows are not always running the same as they do in a browser, since the JavaScript capabilities of the Windows GUI are restricted. It is always better to consume flavors in a browser session instead of WinGUI.

With that said, if a script was working OK in the Windows GUI earlier, that is ought to work after a Windows update too. The first thing I'd suggest is trying to test the issue with the latest available WinGUI version and patch level, and if that is still not working, then create a customer support incident for component BC-FES-GUI (not BC-PER). It is the Windows GUI support team's job to help with issues related to Personas flavor consumption there.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM RF developments
entry.content: Very nice blog, thank you Harish!

entry.title: Integration between Ariba SLP and TM extra stack through DRF.
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We are facing an issue, where sending the same Business Partners from ECC to TM Extra stack and Ariba SLP can be done to each of them, but not at the same time. Both are integrated through DRF. TM extra stack does not fail. It fails at the response received from ECC to Ariba SLP at vendor/business partner creation. 

 

Have you had this architecture, and have you faced issues as we are?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: sales billing quantity based on schedule lines
entry.content: Dear Vivek , thank you for your reply . In fact billing relevence is set to B in VOV7 . it VTFA when Copy control is set to B (delivery qty minus invoiced qty) result is 0 Qty in billing document . When set to A (order qty minus invoiced qty) , result is Total qty is fetched in billing document . My purpose is to bring qty that i entered in schedule line (partial qty) .

entry.title: Re: [Compensation] Unexpected Weighted Calculation
entry.content:
hi @pwc_94 

Look for an xml tag in the PM form or in VP called "Normalize-" and flip its value around.

I am trying to find more information on the normalization behavior (look in KBA too) 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: How to do printing of Multiple Warehouse Tasks?
entry.content:
We have a business requirement to print multiple warehouse tasks at one go. Currently, we are able to print only one task at a time in Warehouse Monitor APP - Documents - Warehouse Orders - Warehouse Tasks - Print.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to do printing of Multiple Warehouse Tasks?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

I would recommend checking the APP Process Warehouse Tasks.  

You can directly choose one or multiple warehouse tasks for confirmation or cancellation. You can print a warehouse task list with this app.

To preview the warehouse task list, you can choose the Reprint Warehouse Order method under the Warehouse Order node of the Warehouse Monitor app. When you choose a warehouse task for printing, the system prints a single document for the relevant warehouse order. All warehouse tasks for this warehouse order are printed. In the default setting, the system prints the list for only open warehouse orders. If you want to print a list for a warehouse order with a different status, such as Confirmed, adjust the settings in the Output Parameter Determination app.

For further information, please check the SAP documentaiton:

Process Warehouse Tasks

Best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: sales billing quantity based on schedule lines
entry.content: Dear Jignesh , thanks for you reply , proforma invoice is there but business requirement is applied on new foreign customers , final invoice is required for advance payments

entry.title: BSEG-EBELN and EBELP not populated at BTE 1120 structure
entry.content:
Hi!!

I have implemented a process function module for BTE 1120 to make some substitutions at MIRO after post document, but as a condition for substitution I need to check the PO we are processing in  MIRO...

I need: EKKO for PO type, and EKPO for Account Assignment Category (KNTTP)

t_BSEG structure has EBELN and EBELP attributes, but both are empty.

Do you know how to get EBELN and EBELP from BTE 1120 ?

Thanks!!

entry.title: Re: FDA tracking with S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Antoine ,

you ask how we tackle the issue of compliance with certifications imposed by FDA, CSA and other such authorities. The quick answer is, we do not. Unless specified, it is not typically software providers' obligation to meet those certification requirements. An 'entity' in regulated industries may however be required to get audited for their processes, practices and IT infrastructure and to ensure they comply with that industry's regulatory requirements. Where processes, etc., may be deemed insufficient, they, the 'entity' may be required to adapt their processes, etc., accordingly. 

SAP provides for adaptability of their software through configuration and extension capabilities. SAP also provides for best practices across many lines of business, industries, and countries. However, it is always the software using entity that has to maintain its compliance with regulations, not the supplier. 

SAP does comply with an array of regulatory requirements across multiple countries. With which exactly and in respect to what products you can find on the Compliance pages of sap.com, here.

If this response was helpful to you, please mark it accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Where can I configure the “To-Do Task Reminder” email...
entry.content: @Seifert, can you check if the content of the KBA 2502972 can help you with it?

entry.title: End of Year Celebration: SAP Inside Track 2024 - Transforming with SAP S/4HANA and RISE
entry.content:
Why This Event is a Must-Attend

At the heart of this year’s event are two compelling sessions that will provide you with real-world insights and actionable takeaways. These presentations are designed not only to highlight the success stories of our customers but also to give you the tools and strategies you need to make your own transformation smoother and more successful.

Session 1:S/4HANA RISE at WEL Networks: A Partner-Led Brownfield Transformation

For the first time ever, we’ll have Chris Puddle from WEL Networks and Paul Brown, Solution Architect at Deloitte, take the stage to share the story of their successful Brownfield transformation from SAP ECC to S/4HANA with RISE with SAP. This session will cover the entire journey—from project initiation and timelines to the real challenges and key milestones that helped them succeed.

You’ll learn:

  • How WEL Networks partnered with Deloitte to navigate the complexities of the transformation process.
  • What it means to undergo a Brownfield transformation in the context of S/4HANA and why it's crucial for those still on ECC.
  • Key insights, tips, and “gotchas” that can save you time and resources as you prepare for your own move to S/4HANA.

This session is perfect for anyone involved in or planning to embark on an S/4HANA transformation, especially as we approach the 2027 deadline for ECC migration.

Session 2: Unlock the Full Potential of Your GROW Entitlements: Maximize SAP S/4HANA Cloud Benefits

If you’re already using SAP S/4HANA Cloud or are considering the shift, then you’ll want to hear from Grace Melhuish, Enterprise Customer Success Partner at SAP. Grace will walk you through how to maximize your GROW with SAP entitlements to fully unlock the power of S/4HANA Cloud.

This session will focus on:

  • Continuous Quality Checks and Cloud ALM, helping you ensure your system is running smoothly and optimally at every stage.
  • How to leverage your SAP investment to drive business transformation, not just on the technical side, but in delivering real business value.
  • Tips on ensuring long-term success in the cloud and how you can utilize the full suite of services available to you.

Whether you’re just starting out with S/4HANA Cloud or looking to enhance your existing setup, this session will provide valuable insights into how to get the most out of your cloud investment.

Event Details:

📅Date: 4th December 2024
⏰Time: 4:30 PM onwards
📍Location: SAP Building, Queen Street

This is a free event, and we encourage you to bring your colleagues, friends, and peers who are also looking to accelerate their SAP journey. It’s a fantastic opportunity to connect with the SAP community, learn from experts, and set yourself up for success in 2025.

Register Your Interest Don’t wait—spaces are filling up fast! ⏳

A Huge Thank You to Our Community Before we dive into the event itself, we want to take a moment to thank you—our SAP community—for your incredible support over the past year. The success of our SAP Inside Track events wouldn’t be possible without your enthusiasm, feedback, and passion for learning and growing together.

We’ve listened to your feedback from our previous events and have made some exciting changes to this year’s format to ensure even more value and diversity. By moving away from a sole focus on BTP (Business Technology Platform), we’ve expanded our content to reach a broader audience and to better serve the needs of everyone on their SAP journey.

Let’s Close 2024 with a Bang! This event is the perfect opportunity to gather fresh insights, share experiences, and finish the year with actionable takeaways that will set you up for a successful 2025. We’re excited to welcome WEL Networks, Deloitte, and SAP experts to share their experiences, and we hope you’ll join us for a memorable end-of-year celebration.

Spread the word—this is an event you don’t want to miss!

See you on December 4th!

#SAPInsideTrack #S4HANA #RISEwithSAP #GROWwithSAP #TransformationJourney #CustomerStory #SAPCommunity #TechInnovation #LearningTogether #CloudSuccess #DigitalTransformation #EventReminder #FinishStrong #EndOfYearCelebration @jpagcamaran @LuisBecker1 @GDR_ANZ @gracemelhuish @JJSingh @christoph_christophersen @Murali_Shanmugham

entry.title: Re: How to load column table data into hdb collection
entry.content:
You did not write what issues you faced, but for me to get it working I needed to use

 

insert into "myCollection" (SELECT 'myvalue' AS "key" FROM dummy FOR JSON ('arraywrap'='no'));

 

1/ You do not need `VALUES` when inserting from `SELECT`: https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-json-document-store-guide/insert-statement#examples

2/ The result of your `SELECT` is 

[{"key":"myvalue"}]

which cannot be inserted per documentation:

It is not possible to insert multiple documents with a single string, like a string that contains an array of documents.

so I used json_option_string_list 

('arraywrap'='no')

to remove `[]`.

I hope this helps.
--Vitaliy

entry.title: Re: Training Needs Analysis in LMS
entry.content: @Govidude, as I understand the situation, there wouldn't be a way to launch a survey without having it connected to an item, considering the available features. There's an open enhancement request (KBA 2090228) that'd match your scenario. It's possible to vote for it and to follow it: link.

entry.title: Re: cannot create new report in LMS
entry.content: @marko_crvenkov_94, @BromikosHarry, here you can find additional details related to the Learning custom reports: KBA 2379690.

entry.title: Re: supervisor assignment profile
entry.content: @marko_crvenkov_94, can you clarify the steps that are being done, along with the desired outcome, so the situation is clearer?

entry.title: Re: SF Learning - Imported OCN Items Survey
entry.content: @J4DE, there's an enhancement request that got closed due to lack of votes that'd match your scenario. A new one could be created, so it can be voted and reviewed by the Learning Product Management team (KBA 2090228).

entry.title: Providing Feedback in SAP Activate road map viewer via SAP for Me
entry.content:
Last week, my colleague @CKGurav blogged about the introduction of SAP Activate road map viewer in SAP for Me. Following up on his insights, I’d like to talk about the feedback functionality that empowers you to shape our SAP Activate methodology, tools and processes.

If you’ve ever wondered what happens to the feedback you submit, my colleague Dan @dcko  wrote a great blog explaining the process: Behind the Scenes with SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer Feedback. It’s a great overview at how your insights are transformed into meaningful updates and improvements.

Feedback functionality in SAP Activate road map viewer

Feedback is the backbone of how we improve our content. It’s not just about fixing issues reported only, it’s about understanding what works for you, identifying opportunities, and creating content to help you with your transformation journey. 

Here’s why your input is invaluable:

  • It Guides Priorities: Your insights help us focus on the content that matter most.
  • It Sparks Innovation: Feedback often uncovers ideas and opportunities we hadn’t considered, and it help us assess how you are using our content during your transformation journey. 
  • It Builds Better content: Direct input from users ensures our SAP Activate Methodology is user-friendly and impactful.

Updates View via SAP for Me 

Figure 1: SAP Activate road map viewer in SAP for Me - Feedback 

If you’ve explored the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer via SAP for Me, you may have noticed a new Feedback button that wasn’t previously there (See Figure 1). This addition provides two distinct feedback channels:

  1. SAP for Me Feedback: Use this option to share your thoughts on the overall tool experience, including navigation, usability, or additional features you’d like to see (Figure 1).
  2. Roadmap Viewer Feedback: This specific feedback option allows you to provide input on roadmaps content, accelerators, or any challenges you encounter within the Roadmap Viewer itself (Figure 2).

It’s important to understand the difference between these options so your feedback is directed to the right team for action.

See the following image, to understand where you can provide feedback for SAP Activate content related topics. 

Figure 2: SAP Activate Feedback functionality 

Keep the Feedback Coming 

We continue to gather feedback from our own customer community, our SAP experts, and partners, and we follow an agile methodology to build on the previous version and continuously improve the content.

In the past, your feedback has driven meaningful improvements. Whether it was simplifying navigation, creating new tasks, or updating accelerators, your input has helped us focus on what truly matters to you, during your implementation journey. 

The feedback functionality is here to ensure your voice is heard. So, as you explore the new updates, remember that your input directly influences the evolution of our SAP Activate Methodology content.

Thank you for your ongoing support and engagement! 

We will continue to review your feedback, and we encourage to keep using this functionality and share your thoughts.

entry.title: Project Processing Status in Project Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Can you please advise us how to get the project processing status of an Enterprise project via public API?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Project Processing Status in Project Management SAP S...
entry.content: Please use the following API Enterprise Project - Read Project Processing Status and see KBA 3542797 - Retrieving Enterprise Project Processing Status via Public API.

entry.title: Re: Calling Transaction CJ20N
entry.content: thanks a lot, i can CALL transaction on CJ20N using parameter id 'PRO' = PS_PSP_PNR

entry.title: Re: How to configure ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud
entry.content: In case anyone else runs into the same issues we did (outlined above) trying to use the new ATC Configurator app and the ADT check variants, after some back and forth analysis on a support ticket, we ultimately had to install 3 notes to correct all of our issues: 3411048, 3509214, and 3542604.

entry.title: Re: Admin Proxy in the New Learning Experience
entry.content: @Brenda_Jennings, that's right. It shouldn't be happening. The code correction for it is planned to be delivered via the 2411 patch 5 (it should be already available in preview). Additional details can be find in the KBA 3531315.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS annotation for OData boolean ?
entry.content:
Make Sure that the Data Element is created as FLAG or BOOLE_D. And do the following on your CDS or Metadata Extension:
@Consumption.filter: { selectionType: #SINGLE, multipleSelections: false }
Preflg;

entry.title: Re: Admin Proxy in the New Learning Experience
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to do you move flavour changes in SAP screen pers...
entry.content:
That must be some monster flavor if you have such a problem with export / import, and it's a strange situation to have a dump because of this.

My first suggestion would be to compress the undo history of the flavor, since if you want to get the flavor to another client or system, then you are presumably done with development and thus it is unlikely you'd need to revert changes in the flavor editor. This could reduce the number of changes significantly and avoid the dump. In addition, I would also permanently delete (not just mark as deleted) all old, unneeded versions of the flavor for the same reason.

However, if this is a recurring situation for you when you develop in a client where there is sufficient business data and then you need to send the objects to another client where your transports originate from, then this is exactly what the 'push to client' functionality is for. It would be the preferred solution long term. Here is the corresponding documentation page, explaining how to use it: Transport Manager | SAP Help Portal
Still, the above compress / deletion suggestions apply nevertheless, before moving objects.

Alternatively, you could also use the regular transport system via transaction SCC1 or SCC1N but I believe the previous methods should help to achieve your goal.

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile stopped executing after I removed...
entry.content: @Connie3, if I understood it right, yes, the "Execute Changes" needs to be run after saving the changes done in the assignment profile (Executing Changes for Assignment Profile Rules | KBA 2392503).

entry.title: Re: Make a learning activity private
entry.content: @KBramstedt, if I understood it right, there's not a setting in Learning that controls if the calendar invite should be sent as private or not. It'd require an enhancement request (KBA 2090228).

entry.title: Re: AP is executing and a change to AP was saved but not...
entry.content: @Connie3, can you check if the scenario of the KBA 2553648 matches yours, so you can follow the recommended actions to resolve it?

entry.title: Re: AP is executing and a change to AP was saved but not...
entry.content: Thank you so much, this answers my question.

entry.title: Re: custom KPI for SAP business one for the iPhone
entry.content:
Dears,

i'm trying to create a custom KPI , i follow SAP guidelines in the mobile app document for IOS but it's not showing on the mobile app, do you have any simple example to start follow it and figuar out where is my mistakes

entry.title: Re: Custom code analysis for SAP S/4HANA with SAP Fiori App Custom Code Migration
entry.content:
Hi @Vignesh_Sridhar ,

you can use the S/4HANA migration project to create deletion transport based on uploaded usage data to remove obsolete code. Why do you do HANA migration and not S/4HANA conversion?

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Reading Invoice PDF from External systems in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
In this blog , i will discuss on how to read the invoice PDF generated through Outputs in SAP S/4 system from External systems.

S/4 Hana provided a standard API to read , cancel , get PDF  & complete Proforma invoice.

In order to use the API  API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV to get PDF , outputs should be configured using BRF+.

Read Operation:

Read can be used to retrieve Billing document header details based on the billing document number and item details based on billing document header and item number.

use Get Method to read the billing document details.

Cancel  Operation:

Cancel operation is used to cancel single or multiple invoices based on the request from external system or consumers.

POST HTTP method is used to cancel the billing documents. ETAG handling is required for Posting the cancellation.

For any cancellation requests IF-MATCH should be mentioned in the HTTP request, if it is missing then client throws an error response.

Get PDF:

Get PDF method is used to retrieve the PDF from S/4 system outputs.

PDF will be sent to the external system in a ASCII string format (encoded in Base64). The receiver system should convert the base 64 to binary format using a tool or API.

PDF will be encoded in base64, an encoding scheme that represents binary data in an ASCII string format before sent to receiver. 

Example to get PDF:

GET <host>/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/GetPDF?BillingDocument=''9xxxxxxxxx'

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hi,

For Canada T4/RL1, new footnotes are being introduced to replace existing footnotes, and the amounts need to be split during the taxation year.

I'm speaking of F91 and F92 for T4 (replacing F39 and F41 respectively), only effective on or after June 25, 2024, and L-12 and L-13 for RL1 (replacing L-9 and L-10 respectively), only effective on or after June 25, 2024.

Will SAP be releasing updates for these footnotes, will the proration formula (for the split amounts) be included with the updates, and when will they be delivered?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile stopped executing after I removed...
entry.content: Thank you for the KBA, my question is a little different.

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile stopped executing after I removed...
entry.content: Thank you for the KBA, my question is a little different. I started with an active AP that had 1 group with 2 rules. I needed to remove 1 rule just long enough to report the Download Preview Users with only 1 rule. I removed the 1 rule and save. The group had 1 rule left, I downloaded the report and then added the second rule back and clicked "Save". Basically, I did not make any permanent changes. I exited the AP without Actions>Execute Changes. The result = the AP stopped working, did not assign anymore. My question is: Should the AP stop executing only in this case? Or should have continue executing without without any changes since I did not execute the change...Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Happy to have joined and looking forward to participating.

entry.title: changeset processing in sap cap
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Is there any way to enable changeset processing in cap, currently when we select multiple items, it runs request for single object multiple times.

To replicate, Please clone https://github.com/Learnings-1/fiori-elements-incident-management.git
I have created a button process status and want to select multiple items ,
